questions.question: Choose the correct one-word substitute for: The study of the human mind and its functions.
questions.explanation: A) Psychology (noun) – The study of the human mind and its functions मानव मस्तिष्क व उसके कार्यों का अध्ययन • Neurology (noun) – study of nerves तंत्रिका-विज्ञान • Physiology (noun) – study of functions of living organisms जीव-क्रियाओं का अध्ययन • Pathology (noun) – study of diseases रोग-विज्ञान

questions.question: Rearrange the following sentences to form a meaningful and grammatically correct paragraph: P. He developed his finger strength and dexterity by practicing his scales and chords daily. Q. He studied sheet music for hours, learning to play tunes that got harder and harder. R. He had mastered his new instrument and was now a musician. S. He played a challenging piece perfectly from memory while performing for his buddies.
questions.explanation: A) P, Q, S, R He developed his finger strength and dexterity by practicing his scales and chords daily.He studied sheet music for hours, learning to play tunes that got harder and harder He played a challenging piece perfectly from memory while performing for his buddies.He had mastered his new instrument and was now a musician. Sentence P सबसे पहले आता है क्योंकि यह initial practice बताता है: उसने daily scales और chords practice करके अपनी finger strength और dexterity develop की। यहाँ “He” subject है और “developed” verb है। यह paragraph का शुरुआत set करता है। Sentence Q, P के बाद आता है क्योंकि यह अगले step को show करता है: उसने sheet music study की और धीरे-धीरे harder tunes सीखने लगा। यहाँ “He” subject है और “studied… learning” verbs हैं। यह P में practice के बाद next step दिखाता है — learning और skill build करना। Sentence S, Q के बाद आता है क्योंकि अब उसने acquired skills को practically demonstrate किया। यहाँ “He” subject है और “played… perfectly” verb phrase है। यह दिखाता है कि उसने जो skills और practice की, उसका इस्तेमाल performance में किया। Sentence R paragraph का last sentence है क्योंकि यह conclusion देता है: उसने अपने instrument को master कर लिया और अब वह musician बन गया है। यहाँ “He” subject है और “had mastered… was” verb phrase है। Sentence P comes first because it introduces the initial practice: he developed his finger strength and dexterity by practicing scales and chords daily. “He” is the subject, and “developed” is the verb. This sets the beginning of the paragraph. Sentence Q comes after P because it shows the next step: he studied sheet music and gradually learned harder tunes. “He” is the subject, and “studied… learning” are the verbs. This logically follows P, showing the progression from practice to learning. Sentence S comes after Q because now he demonstrates his acquired skills practically. “He” is the subject, and “played… perfectly” is the verb phrase. This shows how he uses his skills in performance. Sentence R comes last because it gives the conclusion: he had mastered his instrument and is now a musician. “He” is the subject, and “had mastered… was” is the verb phrase, showing the final outcome.

questions.question: Choose the best option to replace the underlined part to improve the given sentence. If no substitution is required, select 'No substitution.' My sister is very good at children.
questions.explanation: B) good at के बदले good with का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि किसी व्यक्ति की बच्चों, जानवरों या लोगों के साथ व्यवहारिक कुशलता बताने के लिए good with + noun का प्रयोग होता है; जैसे— She is good with kids. • ‘good with’ will be used instead of ‘good at’ because to show skill or ease in handling people, children, or animals the structure good with + noun is used; like— She is good with kids.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate antonym of the word: Sublime
questions.explanation: A) Sublime (adjective) – of great excellence, grandeur, or beauty; inspiring awe श्रेष्ठ / उत्कृष्ट Antonym: Mediocre (adjective) – ordinary, not very good, lacking excellence साधारण / औसत • Exalted (adjective) – elevated, noble, highly praised उच्च • Glorious (adjective) – magnificent, splendid, admirable शानदार / गौरवपूर्ण • Supreme (adjective) – highest in rank or quality सर्वोच्च

questions.question: Select the most appropriate antonym of the word: Veracity
questions.explanation: A) Veracity (noun) – truthfulness, honesty, accuracy, correctness, authenticity सत्यता / सच्चाई Antonym: Falsehood (noun) – lie, untruth, fabrication, deception, falsity असत्य / झूठ • Truth (noun) – fact, reality, verity सत्य • Accuracy (noun) – precision, correctness, exactness शुद्धता • Authenticity (noun) – genuineness, legitimacy, validity प्रामाणिकता

questions.question: Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error. A. He has been B. to Italy, C. but he D. didn't went to Rome.
questions.explanation: D) went' के बदले 'go' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि did पहले से ही Past का Sense दे रहा है; अतः Main Verb V1 (Base Form) में रहेगा; जैसे— He did not go there yesterday. • 'go' will be used instead of 'went' because did already carries the Past sense, so the Main Verb must remain in Base Form (V1); Like— He did not go there yesterday.

questions.question: Select the correct active form of the given sentence. The massive exterior wall of the old mansion was being painted by the skilled laborers when it suddenly started raining heavily.
options: The skilled laborers painted the massive exterior wall of the old mansion when it suddenly started raining heavily.
The skilled laborers are painting the massive exterior wall of the old mansion when it suddenly started raining heavily.
The skilled laborers had been painting the massive exterior wall of the old mansion when it suddenly started raining heavily.
The skilled laborers were painting the massive exterior wall of the old mansion when it suddenly started raining heavily.
questions.explanation: D) "Was being painted" (Past Continuous Passive) की active voice "were painting" (Past Continuous Active) होती है। "Was being painted by the skilled laborers" → "The skilled laborers were painting..." — subject और object की जगह बदल जाती है। "Was being painted" is Past Continuous Passive. Its active form is Past Continuous Active = "were painting." The sentence correctly becomes: "The skilled laborers were painting the massive exterior wall of the old mansion when it suddenly started raining heavily." ✅ Correct sentence: The skilled laborers were painting the massive exterior wall...

questions.question: One of these words is spelled incorrectly. Which one is it?
questions.explanation: C) The word ‘Perseverence’ is spelled incorrectly. The correct spelling is ‘Perseverance’, which means continued effort despite difficulties — धैर्यपूर्वक निरंतर प्रयास.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the word: Abrogate
questions.explanation: C) Abrogate (verb) – to cancel, revoke, annul, abolish, repeal. निरस्त करना / समाप्त करना Synonyms: Repeal (verb) – cancel or withdraw a law, act, or decision. रद्द करना • Institute (verb) – to establish or set up. स्थापित करना (≠ abrogate) • Enact (verb) – to make into law. कानून बनाना (≠ abrogate) • Approve (verb) – to accept officially. मंज़ूरी देना (≠ abrogate)

questions.question: Choose the correct meaning of the idiom: Fallen off the radar
questions.explanation: B) Fallen off the radar (idiom)- Become unnoticed नज़र से ओझल होना / ध्यान से गायब हो जाना

questions.question: Read the following passage and answer the questions: Medical waste management is one of the most important yet often overlooked aspects of healthcare. Hospitals, clinics, and laboratories generate large amounts of waste every day, including used syringes, bandages, gloves, and other materials that may be contaminated. If not handled and disposed of properly, this waste can pose serious risks to human health and the environment. Proper medical waste management involves separating, treating, and safely disposing of different types of waste. Many healthcare institutions follow strict guidelines to ensure that hazardous waste is not mixed with general waste. Incineration, chemical treatment, and secure landfills are some common methods used to manage medical waste. However, poor management and lack of awareness still lead to unsafe disposal practices in some places. Experts believe that training healthcare workers, strict enforcement of rules, and public awareness are essential to improving medical waste management and protecting communities from potential harm. Identify the voice (active or passive) and the tense of the verb in the sentence: "Many healthcare institutions follow strict guidelines to ensure that hazardous waste is not mixed with general waste."
questions.explanation: C) Voice और Tense पहचानने के लिए वाक्य में दिए गए Verb और उसके रूप को देखा जाता है। दिए गए वाक्य में मुख्य clause है — “Many healthcare institutions follow strict guidelines”. यहाँ “Many healthcare institutions” Subject है और “follow” Verb है जो Simple Present में है तथा Subject स्वयं क्रिया कर रहा है, इसलिए Voice Active है। To identify voice and tense, we check the main verb and how the action is performed. In this case, the main clause “Many healthcare institutions follow strict guidelines” shows that the subject performs the action directly, making the voice Active, and the verb “follow” indicates a habitual/general action, making the tense Simple Present.

questions.question: Read the following passage and answer the questions: Medical waste management is one of the most important yet often overlooked aspects of healthcare. Hospitals, clinics, and laboratories generate large amounts of waste every day, including used syringes, bandages, gloves, and other materials that may be contaminated. If not handled and disposed of properly, this waste can pose serious risks to human health and the environment. Proper medical waste management involves separating, treating, and safely disposing of different types of waste. Many healthcare institutions follow strict guidelines to ensure that hazardous waste is not mixed with general waste. Incineration, chemical treatment, and secure landfills are some common methods used to manage medical waste. However, poor management and lack of awareness still lead to unsafe disposal practices in some places. Experts believe that training healthcare workers, strict enforcement of rules, and public awareness are essential to improving medical waste management and protecting communities from potential harm. Identify the part of speech of the word "properly" in the sentence: "If not handled and disposed of properly, this waste can pose serious risks to human health and the environment."
questions.explanation: B) ‘Adverb’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि “properly” यहाँ verb phrase “handled and disposed of” को modify कर रहा है और यह बताता है कि काम कैसे किया जा रहा है। इसलिए यह manner adverb के रूप में कार्य कर रहा है। • ‘Properly’ should be used as an adverb because it modifies the verb phrase “handled and disposed of”, indicating how the action is performed. Therefore, it functions as a manner adverb in the sentence.

questions.question: Read the following passage and answer the questions: Medical waste management is one of the most important yet often overlooked aspects of healthcare. Hospitals, clinics, and laboratories generate large amounts of waste every day, including used syringes, bandages, gloves, and other materials that may be contaminated. If not handled and disposed of properly, this waste can pose serious risks to human health and the environment. Proper medical waste management involves separating, treating, and safely disposing of different types of waste. Many healthcare institutions follow strict guidelines to ensure that hazardous waste is not mixed with general waste. Incineration, chemical treatment, and secure landfills are some common methods used to manage medical waste. However, poor management and lack of awareness still lead to unsafe disposal practices in some places. Experts believe that training healthcare workers, strict enforcement of rules, and public awareness are essential to improving medical waste management and protecting communities from potential harm. The word "contaminated" means:
questions.explanation: C) ‘Made impure or infected’ सही होगा क्योंकि “contaminated” शब्द का अर्थ होता है किसी चीज़ का दूषित, अशुद्ध या संक्रमित हो जाना, जैसा कि medical waste के संदर्भ में बताया गया है। • ‘Made impure or infected’ should be used because “contaminated” refers to becoming dirty, impure, or infected, which fits the context of medical waste described in the passage.

questions.question: Read the following passage and answer the questions: Medical waste management is one of the most important yet often overlooked aspects of healthcare. Hospitals, clinics, and laboratories generate large amounts of waste every day, including used syringes, bandages, gloves, and other materials that may be contaminated. If not handled and disposed of properly, this waste can pose serious risks to human health and the environment. Proper medical waste management involves separating, treating, and safely disposing of different types of waste. Many healthcare institutions follow strict guidelines to ensure that hazardous waste is not mixed with general waste. Incineration, chemical treatment, and secure landfills are some common methods used to manage medical waste. However, poor management and lack of awareness still lead to unsafe disposal practices in some places. Experts believe that training healthcare workers, strict enforcement of rules, and public awareness are essential to improving medical waste management and protecting communities from potential harm. What is the main idea of the passage?
options: Medical waste management is essential to protect health and environment
Hospitals can mix all waste together
Incineration is the only method of disposal
questions.explanation: B) ‘Medical waste management is essential to protect health and environment’ सही होगा क्योंकि पूरे passage में medical waste के खतरों, उसके उचित निस्तारण और नियमों व जागरूकता की आवश्यकता पर जोर दिया गया है। • ‘Medical waste management is essential to protect health and environment’ should be used because the passage focuses on the dangers of medical waste and stresses the need for proper disposal, rules, and awareness to safeguard people and the environment.

questions.question: Read the following passage and answer the questions: Medical waste management is one of the most important yet often overlooked aspects of healthcare. Hospitals, clinics, and laboratories generate large amounts of waste every day, including used syringes, bandages, gloves, and other materials that may be contaminated. If not handled and disposed of properly, this waste can pose serious risks to human health and the environment. Proper medical waste management involves separating, treating, and safely disposing of different types of waste. Many healthcare institutions follow strict guidelines to ensure that hazardous waste is not mixed with general waste. Incineration, chemical treatment, and secure landfills are some common methods used to manage medical waste. However, poor management and lack of awareness still lead to unsafe disposal practices in some places. Experts believe that training healthcare workers, strict enforcement of rules, and public awareness are essential to improving medical waste management and protecting communities from potential harm. What term describes the assumption of something as true without proof?
questions.explanation: C) Presumption (noun) – Assumption of something as true without proof बिना सिद्ध किए मान लेना • Hypothesis (noun) – proposed explanation परिकल्पना/अनुमान • Inference (noun) – conclusion drawn from evidence प्रमाण से निकाला गया निष्कर्ष • Conclusion (noun) – final decision or judgment अंतिम निष्कर्ष

questions.question: Choose the correctly spelt word:
questions.explanation: A) The correct spelling is ‘Sacrilegious’, which means showing disrespect or violation of something considered sacred — अपवित्र करने वाला, धर्म का अपमान करने वाला.

questions.question: Choose the correct one-word substitute for: A government by a single person.
questions.explanation: C) Autocracy (noun) – Government in which one person holds absolute power एक व्यक्ति द्वारा पूर्ण नियंत्रण वाला शासन • Democracy (noun) – Government by the people जनता द्वारा शासन • Oligarchy (noun) – Government by a small group अल्पतंत्र • Plutocracy (noun) – Government by the wealthy धनिकों द्वारा शासन

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the word: Epistemic
questions.explanation: B) Epistemic (adjective) – related to knowledge, understanding, or the study of knowledge. ज्ञान से सम्बंधित / ज्ञानमीमांसीय Synonym: • Knowledge-related (adjective) – connected with knowledge or ways of knowing. ज्ञान आधारित • Physical (adjective) – related to the body or material world. भौतिक • Symbolic (adjective) – serving as a symbol or representation. सांकेतिक • Spatial (adjective) – related to space or location. स्थानिक

questions.question: The following sentence has two blanks. Choose the most suitable set of prepositions from the given options to fill in the blanks and complete the sentence meaningfully: She was reprimanded ____ being late and warned ____ further delays.
questions.explanation: B) ‘for’ और ‘against’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि reprimanded के बाद कारण बताने के लिए ‘for’ आता है, और warned के साथ भविष्य में होने वाली नकारात्मक स्थिति से सावधान करने के लिए ‘against’ का प्रयोग किया जाता है। यहाँ being late कारण है, और further delays भविष्य की संभावित गलती है, इसलिए यही जोड़ी अर्थपूर्ण है। • ‘For, against’ should be used because ‘reprimanded for’ correctly introduces the reason for criticism, while ‘warned against’ is used to caution someone about possible future actions or consequences. Hence, “reprimanded for being late and warned against further delays” is grammatically and semantically correct.

questions.question: Which of the following sentences uses the word "bat" with the same meaning as in the following sentence? "He took a swing with his new wooden bat"
options: The bat is the only flying mammal.
The coach handed him the bat before he went up to the plate.
A furry little bat got into the attic last night.
The bat's wingspan was surprisingly large.
questions.explanation: B) Highlighted वाक्य में ‘bat’ का अर्थ है — खेल में उपयोग होने वाला बल्ला (sports equipment)। विकल्प B में भी ‘bat’ का अर्थ बल्ला ही है — कोच ने उसे बल्ला दिया। इसलिए यह same meaning का सही उदाहरण है। In the highlighted sentence, ‘bat’ refers to a piece of sports equipment used for hitting. Option B also uses ‘bat’ with the same meaning — the coach handed him the bat. Thus, option B matches the same meaning.

questions.question: Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: A. He are one of the B. few researchers whom I believe C. has the potential to make a D. significant breakthrough in this field.
options: has the potential to make a
questions.explanation: A) ‘are’ के स्थान पर ‘is’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि Subject ‘He’ Singular है, इसलिए Singular Verb ‘is’ आयेगा। जैसे— He is one of the few researchers… • ‘is’ will be used instead of ‘are’ because the subject ‘He’ is singular, therefore the verb must be singular. Like— He is one of the few researchers…

questions.question: Choose the correct meaning of the idiom: Dicing with death
questions.explanation: A) Dicing with death (idiom) -Taking extreme risks बहुत बड़ा जोखिम लेना / जान जोखिम में डालना

questions.question: Fill in the blank with the most appropriate preposition: The teacher divided the students _____ four groups for the activity.
questions.explanation: C) 'into' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि किसी समूह को कई भागों/ग्रुपों में बाँटने के लिए English में हमेशा divide + into का प्रयोग किया जाता है — जैसे divide into parts/groups/sections। • 'into' should be used because when someone or something is divided to form separate groups or parts, the correct preposition in English is into. Here, the students are being divided into four groups, which makes option C the most appropriate choice.

questions.question: Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error. A. The movie B. which you recommended, C. was both interesting D. and entertain.
questions.explanation: D) entertain' के बदले 'entertaining' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि यहाँ दोनों भागों में समान रूप से adjectives चाहिए — interesting और entertaining; जैसे— The book was exciting and informative. • 'entertaining' will be used instead of 'entertain' because we need parallel adjectives in structure — interesting and entertaining; Like— The book was exciting and informative.

questions.question: Choose the best option to replace the underlined part to improve the given sentence. If no substitution is required, select 'No substitution.' The room is 5 meters on 5 meters.
questions.explanation: A) 'on 5 meters' के बदले 'by 5 meters' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि length × width के माप बताने के लिए standard expression “by” प्रयोग होता है; जैसे— The hall is 10 meters by 8 meters. • 'by 5 meters' will be used instead of 'on 5 meters' because dimensions are expressed using the pattern number + unit + by + number + unit.
